summary: Block 1 Stamp & Document Branding testing complete. All backend APIs and frontend UI features verified. Connected Triad SVG stamp generator working correctly with circle/square shapes. Document headers use Connected Triad logo + Konekt wordmark. Gold contact bar present. Stamp preview sizing fixed (176x176px in builder, 96x96px in footer preview).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 1 stamp redesign complete. Connected Triad icon (3 nodes + connections) now used as stamp center mark instead of JPEG photo. _connected_triad_svg() generates the icon programmatically. Document headers use _connected_triad_logo_svg() for white-on-navy logo. Settings Hub Document Branding tab at /admin/settings-hub with data-testid='settings-tab-branding'.

backend_apis.POST_generate_stamp_circle: PASS - Returns SVG with Connected Triad elements (stroke-linecap, topArc textPath, KONEKT wordmark)
backend_apis.POST_generate_stamp_square: PASS - Returns valid SVG with rect elements and Connected Triad
backend_apis.GET_statement_preview: PASS - Returns HTML with Connected Triad SVG logo and gold contact bar (#D4A843)
backend_apis.GET_invoice_branding: PASS - Returns branding defaults with all expected fields
backend_apis.POST_logo_upload: PASS - Accepts image files, rejects non-images

frontend_ui.stamp_builder_visible: PASS - GeneratedStampBuilder component renders with shape/color/text fields
frontend_ui.stamp_preview_area: PASS - Shows generated SVG stamp at 176x176px (w-44 h-44)
frontend_ui.generate_svg_button: PASS - Clicking 'Generate SVG Preview' creates stamp and displays it
frontend_ui.document_footer_preview: PASS - Shows stamp (96x96px) next to signatory without overflow
frontend_ui.document_preview_panel: PASS - Shows Invoice Preview and Quote Preview tabs
frontend_ui.invoice_preview_header: PASS - Connected Triad logo + Konekt wordmark in navy header
frontend_ui.invoice_preview_gold_bar: PASS - Gold contact bar (#D4A843) with email/phone/address
frontend_ui.invoice_preview_items_table: PASS - Items table with Description, Qty, Price, Total columns
frontend_ui.invoice_preview_auth_area: PASS - Stamp properly contained (not cropped) in authorization area
frontend_ui.quote_preview: PASS - Same branding as Invoice Preview with QUOTATION title

mocked_apis_list: Resend email service - dry-run mode, logs to console instead of sending emails
